name: Sparse

documentation.description:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  File:            sparse.ads
  Description:     Sparse matrices, generic package
                     Compressed Row Storage (CRS) format
                     doc. @ http://www.netlib.org/

  Date / Version:  01-Jan-2011 ; 21-Nov-2010 ;
                   08-Jun-2001 ; ... ; 29-Mar-1999

  Author:          Olivier Besson, Universite de Neuchatel & Cray research
                   Olivier.Besson (at) UniNe.ch

  Ada version:     Gautier de Montmollin
                   http://gautiersblog.blogspot.com/

  NB: From 8-Jun-2001 version, (bi)conjugate gradient algorithms
      are detached in a package independent of matrix type
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

array_types.name: Index_Array
array_types.code: type Index_Array is array (Index range <>) of Index;

record_types.name: CRS_matrix

fields.name: symmetric
fields.description: rows and nnz are effective upper bounds for matrix re-use

subprograms.name: Add
subprograms.code: procedure Add (A : in out CRS_matrix; i, j : Index; value : Real)

subprograms.name: Add_scaled
subprograms.code: procedure Add_scaled (factor : Real; u : in Vector; v : in out Vector)

subprograms.name: Copy
subprograms.code: procedure Copy (u : in Vector; v : out Vector)

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code: function  Get (A : in     CRS_matrix; i, j : Index) return Real

subprograms.name: Mult
subprograms.code: procedure Mult (A : in CRS_matrix; u : Vector; w : in out Vector)

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code: procedure Put (A : in out CRS_matrix; i, j : Index; value : Real)

subprograms.name: Scale
subprograms.code: procedure Scale (factor : Real; u : in out Vector)

generic_instantiations.name: Dispose
generic_instantiations.code: procedure Dispose is new Ada.Unchecked_Deallocation (CRS_matrix, p_CRS_matrix);

formals.name: Vector
formals.code: type Vector is array (Index range <>) of Real;
